text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — frontier models & headless auth

86 PRs merged this week. The infrastructure grew, the UI got less corporate, and we added enough models to make your terminal heavy.

───

→ THE MODEL AVALANCHE
Added Alibaba Qwen (text/vision/image), Amazon Nova, xAI Grok (text/image/video), and Wan2.2. Qwen and Wan2.2 are on the free tier.

→ HEADLESS AUTH
Shipped Device Authorization Grant (RFC 8628). You can now authenticate from the CLI without pasting tokens around like it's 2014.

→ HOURLY DRIPS
Moved all tiers to hourly pollen refills. We also fixed the Spore-to-Seed GitHub upgrade scoring.

→ DE-CORPORATIZING
Replaced 3 confusing dashboards with a clean App Ecosystem and Leaderboard. Toned down the business language. Less marketing, more hackerspace.

→ COMMUNITY APPS
Over 30 new community apps added to the ecosystem this week. Changed the rules so all tiers can submit apps.

───

Everything is open source. Come build something weird.
github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools
